Name: Label
Description: A display label for the ConceptualComponentModule.

Name: Coverage
Description: Provides information about the topical, spatial, and temporal coverage of the conceptual components included in this module.

Name: ConceptSchemeReference
Description: Contains a set of the concepts measured by the data that are being documented.

Name: UniverseSchemeReference
Description: Contains a set of the Universes and sub-universes of the data that are being documented.

Name: GeographicStructureSchemeReference
Description: Contains a collection of geographic structures.

Name: GeographicLocationSchemeReference
Description: Contains a collection of geographic locations.

Name: UnitTypeSchemeReference
Description: Contains a collection of unit types.
